mapper.select: SELECT ad.ho_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.member.resident.mapper.IResidentMoveMapper.selectHoList*/ , ad.ho , au.dong_nm FROM hshld_head hh INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON hh.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no WHERE hh.user_no = #{userNo} AND au.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND hh.INOUT_CD = 'WAIT'

SELECT m.user_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.member.resident.mapper.IResidentMoveMapper.selectMngNo*/ FROM manager m INNER JOIN mgmt_office mo ON m.mgmt_ofc_no = mo.mgmt_ofc_no WHERE mo.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND ROWNUM = 1
